info.title: Selva Hardware Shop API
info.description: Complete backend API for Hardware Shop Management System

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Auth endpoints - login does not require JWT

get.summary: Get all products with optional filter
Get all payment transactions with optional filters
Get all invoices with optional filters
Get all employees with optional active filter and search

post.summary: Add new employee (code auto-generated if not provided)

get.summary: Get all customers with optional filter and search
Get all commissions with optional filters

post.summary: Mark or update attendance for an employee (upsert by employee+date)

get.summary: Search product by code or barcode
Calculate payroll with Loss of Pay for an employee (year+month)
Get attendance records for an employee in a date range
Get all employees' attendance for a specific date
